inspo.title: Love Hultén — Ferrofluid Synth Guitar
inspo.desc: Modified Arturia MicroFreak in hand-built body with dancing ferrofluid visualizer, steel rod pitch control, magnetic sequencer. The ferrofluid shows the sound before you hear it.

inspo.title: ::vtol:: — Kinetic Code Sculptures
inspo.desc: Electronic installations reacting to environment + viewers. "Reading My Body" turns tattoos into music. "Last Breath" — wearable mask organ. Showed at Sónar+D June 2025.

inspo.title: EightNote — Kinetic Magnetic MIDI Controller
inspo.desc: MIDI.org Innovation Award 2025. Magnetic balls on a sliding 8-lane panel — rhythm as physical gesture. Open-source firmware planned.

inspo.title: Zimoun — Sound Installations
inspo.desc: Hundreds of identical motors + everyday materials = emergent sonic landscapes. New commission: Staatsschauspiel Dresden 2026.

inspo.title: Trimpin — The OG MIDI Sculptor
inspo.desc: 30+ years of electromechanical sculptures via MIDI + microcontrollers. Building-scale instruments that play themselves.

inspo.title: Diriyah Biennale — Generative Islamic Patterns
inspo.desc: Workshop: photograph architectural motifs → AI → digital artworks with natural elements. Watch for cycle 3 open call.

inspo.title: Transient Labs — Creator Platform
inspo.desc: 1/1s, editions, zero seller fees. Preferred minting platform. Strong for premium pieces.

inspo.title: fxhash Protocol Update
inspo.desc: FXH token + "art coins" + "open-form generative art." New economics for onchain generative art.

concepts.title: The Callback Machine
concepts.body: Islamic geometric patterns generated by one rule repeated. Generative piece starts as chaos, reveals the single rotation underneath. Perceptual one-way door applied to sacred geometry.

concepts.title: The Instrument That Watches You Back
concepts.body: Camera tracking watching a performer's body tension/breath/posture. Instrument reacts: softens when anxious, pushes back when confident. Not AI — reactive physics. Duet discovered.

concepts.title: Zimoun's Law
concepts.body: One motor + one cotton ball = boring. 139 = living organism. Your art needs ONE elegant rule iterated 10,000 times. Beauty is in the moment the audience realizes the rule.

concepts.title: The Muezzin's Delay
concepts.body: Adhan cascades across cities as each muezzin starts moments apart. Spatial canon written by architecture. Sound installation with speakers at cascading distances. The room becomes the instrument.

concepts.title: Tattoo Machine Score
concepts.body: Generative system creates visual score, robotic arm draws it as ink in real-time. Paper = record. Drawing IS the music frozen. Frame it. Play it back with a camera.

concepts.title: The Prayer Rug Sequencer
concepts.body: Prayer rug geometric patterns as step sequencer grid. Conductive thread at intersections = trigger points. Sacred geometry literally becomes music. The math that made these patterns = Euclidean rhythms.

concepts.title: Crown Shyness Code
concepts.body: Particles grow and fill space but never overlap. Run it long enough and it looks like Islamic geometric patterns. Nature and sacred geometry share a codebase.

concepts.title: The Ferrofluid Qibla
concepts.body: Ferrofluid cell with hidden magnet toward Mecca. Fluid perpetually reaches one direction. Visitors don't know why until the label. Liquid compass performing devotion.
